title: Investigation Summary
description: Bounded iteration-level summary for context passing to the next iteration's planner. Produced after extraction, consumed by the design prompt.

what_was_tested.description: Brief description of the hypothesis tested this iteration.

key_findings.description: What was learned: confirmed, refuted, or partially confirmed results.

principles_changed.description: Which principles were inserted, updated, or pruned.

suggested_next_direction.description: What the next iteration should investigate.
